com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.crypto

Enum MACType

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<MACType>
      • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.crypto.MACType
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<MACType>

    public enum MACType
extends java.lang.Enum<MACType>
    MAC type.

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant and Description
      AES_CMAC
      CMAC calculating by a AES key.
      AES_DUKPT_CMAC
      CMAC calculating by an AES_DUKPT key.
      AES_DUKPT_LAST
      MAC using a DUKPT key with AES on last block only, 9606
      AES_DUKPT_UNIONPAY_ECB
      MAC using a DUKPT key with TDES on the first 4 bytes of last block.
      AES_DUKPT_X919
      MAC using a DUKPT key with sigle DES on each block, but full TDES on last block
      AES_DUKPT_X99
      MAC using a DUKPT key with AES on all blocks, X99
      AES_LAST
      MAC Digital signature with AES on last block only, 9606
      AES_X99
      MAC Digital signature with AES on all blocks, X99
      DUKPT_CMAC
      CMAC calculating by a DUKPT key.
      DUKPT_LAST
      MAC using a DUKPT key with TDES on last block only, 9606
      DUKPT_RESP_LAST
      MAC using a DUKPT key (response) with TDES on last block only, 9606
      DUKPT_RESP_UNIONPAY_ECB
      MAC using a DUKPT key (response) with TDES on the first 4 bytes of last block, in accordance to the UnionPay requirement.
      DUKPT_RESP_X919
      MAC using a DUKPT key (response) with single DES on each block, but full TDES on last block.
      DUKPT_RESP_X99
      MAC using a DUKPT key (response) with TDES on all blocks, X99
      DUKPT_UNIONPAY_ECB
      MAC Digital signature with TDES on the first 4 bytes of last block, in accordance to the UnionPay requirement.
      DUKPT_X919
      MAC Digital signature with single DES on each block, but full TDES on last block.
      DUKPT_X99
      MAC using a DUKPT key with TDES on all blocks, X99
      HMAC_SHA1
      HMAC using a HMAC key with SHA1 hash function
      HMAC_SHA256
      HMAC using a HMAC key with SHA256 hash function
      SM4_LAST
      MAC Digital signature with SM4 on last block only.
      SM4_UNIONPAY_ECB
      MAC Digital signature with SM4 on the first 4 bytes of last block.
      SM4_X99
      MAC Digital signature with SM4 on all blocks.
      TDES_CMAC
      CMAC calculating by a TDES key.
      TDES_LAST
      MAC Digital signature with TDES on last block only, 9606
      TDES_UNIONPAY_ECB
      MAC Digital signature with TDES on the first 4 bytes of last block, in accordance to the UnionPay requirement.
      TDES_X919
      MAC Digital signature with single DES on each block, but full TDES on last block.
      TDES_X99
      MAC Digital signature with TDES on all blocks, X99

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • TDES_LAST

        public static final MACType TDES_LAST
        MAC Digital signature with TDES on last block only, 9606

      • TDES_X99

        public static final MACType TDES_X99
        MAC Digital signature with TDES on all blocks, X99

      • TDES_X919

        public static final MACType TDES_X919
        MAC Digital signature with single DES on each block, but full TDES on last block.

      • TDES_UNIONPAY_ECB

        public static final MACType TDES_UNIONPAY_ECB
        MAC Digital signature with TDES on the first 4 bytes of last block, in accordance to the UnionPay requirement.

      • DUKPT_LAST

        public static final MACType DUKPT_LAST
        MAC using a DUKPT key with TDES on last block only, 9606

      • DUKPT_X99

        public static final MACType DUKPT_X99
        MAC using a DUKPT key with TDES on all blocks, X99

      • DUKPT_X919

        public static final MACType DUKPT_X919
        MAC Digital signature with single DES on each block, but full TDES on last block.

      • DUKPT_UNIONPAY_ECB

        public static final MACType DUKPT_UNIONPAY_ECB
        MAC Digital signature with TDES on the first 4 bytes of last block, in accordance to the UnionPay requirement.

      • DUKPT_RESP_LAST

        public static final MACType DUKPT_RESP_LAST
        MAC using a DUKPT key (response) with TDES on last block only, 9606

      • DUKPT_RESP_X99

        public static final MACType DUKPT_RESP_X99
        MAC using a DUKPT key (response) with TDES on all blocks, X99

      • DUKPT_RESP_X919

        public static final MACType DUKPT_RESP_X919
        MAC using a DUKPT key (response) with single DES on each block, but full TDES on last block.

      • DUKPT_RESP_UNIONPAY_ECB

        public static final MACType DUKPT_RESP_UNIONPAY_ECB
        MAC using a DUKPT key (response) with TDES on the first 4 bytes of last block, in accordance to the UnionPay requirement.

      • AES_LAST

        public static final MACType AES_LAST
        MAC Digital signature with AES on last block only, 9606

      • AES_X99

        public static final MACType AES_X99
        MAC Digital signature with AES on all blocks, X99

      • AES_DUKPT_LAST

        public static final MACType AES_DUKPT_LAST
        MAC using a DUKPT key with AES on last block only, 9606

      • AES_DUKPT_X99

        public static final MACType AES_DUKPT_X99
        MAC using a DUKPT key with AES on all blocks, X99

      • AES_DUKPT_X919

        public static final MACType AES_DUKPT_X919
        MAC using a DUKPT key with sigle DES on each block, but full TDES on last block

      • AES_DUKPT_UNIONPAY_ECB

        public static final MACType AES_DUKPT_UNIONPAY_ECB
        MAC using a DUKPT key with TDES on the first 4 bytes of last block. In accordance to the UnionPay requirement

      • SM4_LAST

        public static final MACType SM4_LAST
        MAC Digital signature with SM4 on last block only. 9606

      • SM4_X99

        public static final MACType SM4_X99
        MAC Digital signature with SM4 on all blocks. X99

      • SM4_UNIONPAY_ECB

        public static final MACType SM4_UNIONPAY_ECB
        MAC Digital signature with SM4 on the first 4 bytes of last block. In accordance to the UnionPay requirement

      • HMAC_SHA1

        public static final MACType HMAC_SHA1
        HMAC using a HMAC key with SHA1 hash function

      • HMAC_SHA256

        public static final MACType HMAC_SHA256
        HMAC using a HMAC key with SHA256 hash function

      • TDES_CMAC

        public static final MACType TDES_CMAC
        CMAC calculating by a TDES key.

      • DUKPT_CMAC

        public static final MACType DUKPT_CMAC
        CMAC calculating by a DUKPT key.

      • AES_CMAC

        public static final MACType AES_CMAC
        CMAC calculating by a AES key.

      • AES_DUKPT_CMAC

        public static final MACType AES_DUKPT_CMAC
        CMAC calculating by an AES_DUKPT key.

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static MACType[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (MACType c : MACType.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static MACType valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      • getCode

        public int getCode()
